description: Index text chunks and perform semantic search against a Qdrant vector database. Useful for retrieval-augmented generation over a private document corpus.

tools.name: index_documents
tools.description: Index a list of text chunks into the Qdrant collection.

parameters.name: texts
parameters.description: List of text strings to embed and index.

parameters.name: metadata
parameters.description: Optional list of source labels, one per text chunk.

tools.whenToUse: Use when you need to add documents to the knowledge base before searching.
tools.whenNotToUse: Do not use when the corpus is already indexed or when QDRANT_URL is not configured.

tools.name: semantic_search
tools.description: Search the indexed corpus for chunks semantically similar to a query.

parameters.name: top_k
parameters.description: Number of top results to return (max 20).

tools.returns: Ranked list of matching text chunks with similarity scores and sources.
tools.whenToUse: Use when answering questions that require grounding in a private document corpus.
tools.whenNotToUse: Do not use for public web search; prefer web_search.
examples: semantic_search(query='how does incident management work?', top_k=5)

tools.name: collection_info
tools.description: Return metadata about the current Qdrant collection.
tools.returns: Collection name, point count, vector count, and status.
tools.whenToUse: Use to verify indexing status or check collection size.
tools.whenNotToUse: Do not use when the collection state is irrelevant.
